characters.name: Papa Verde
characters.description: Handsome red-eyed tree frog father with brilliant green body, huge glowing red eyes, blue-yellow striped sides, bright orange feet
uniqueFeatures: LARGEST frog character — visibly bigger and more muscular than Mama
BRILLIANT emerald green — the most saturated, vivid green of all characters
HUGE glowing red eyes — the biggest eyes proportionally, like burning rubies
Bold BLUE AND YELLOW striped sides — thick, vivid stripes
BRIGHT ORANGE feet — like wearing orange gloves
Wide, confident stance with toes splayed out
characters.personality: Proud and watchful — sits tall and upright, chest puffed out, always alert and guarding
characters.notLike: NOT soft or delicate like Mama Hoja, NOT tiny like Luna or Brio

characters.name: Mama Hoja
characters.description: Beautiful red-eyed tree frog mother with soft green coloring, gentle red eyes, slightly smaller and more delicate than Papa
uniqueFeatures: SMALLER and more DELICATE than Papa — slimmer build, more graceful
SOFT SAGE GREEN coloring — noticeably lighter and less saturated than Papa's emerald
Gentler, SOFTER red eyes — more orange-red than Papa's ruby-red
Thinner, more delicate blue-yellow side stripes — pastel compared to Papa's bold
Lighter PEACH-ORANGE feet — not as bright as Papa's vivid orange
Rounder face with a sweeter expression
characters.personality: Gentle and nurturing — often leaning down toward the little ones, soft caring posture
characters.notLike: NOT as vibrant or bold-colored as Papa Verde, NOT tiny like the young ones

characters.name: Luna
characters.description: Starts as tiny black tadpole, transforms through stages into a small bright green red-eyed tree frog with huge curious red eyes
uniqueFeatures: TINIEST character — half the size of Mama Hoja
As tadpole: COMPLETELY BLACK with a round head and wiggly tail
As frog: bright green but LIGHTER than Papa, with disproportionately HUGE curious eyes
As frog: smaller and rounder than Mama — baby proportions with oversized head
Signature look of WONDER — eyes always wide open, head tilted with curiosity
Legs are shorter and chubbier than adult frogs
characters.personality: Curious and amazed — always looking at something with wide eyes, head tilted to one side
characters.notLike: NOT as vibrant as Papa, NOT as graceful as Mama, much SMALLER than both parents

characters.name: Brio
characters.description: Luna's older brother, slightly bigger green-brown tadpole with developing legs, later a young red-eyed tree frog
uniqueFeatures: As tadpole: GREEN-BROWN coloring — distinctly different from Luna's pure black
As tadpole: BIGGER than Luna with visible developing back legs
As frog: slightly BIGGER than Luna but still smaller than parents
As frog: GREEN-BROWN tint — muddier, less pure green than Luna or parents
WIDER body than Luna — stockier, less delicate build
Slightly lopsided grin — one side of mouth curves up more
characters.personality: Adventurous and bold — always leaping first, chest forward, ready for action
characters.notLike: NOT pure black like Luna-tadpole, NOT pure green like Luna-frog, NOT as big as parents

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Emphasis on light passing through materials — translucent ears, glowing skin edges, light shining through leaves/water/ice. Subsurface scattering cranked up. Back-lit subjects with ethereal glow.

Rich botanical detail filling the frame — individually rendered leaves, visible bark texture, dewdrops on petals, moss on stones, flowers in full bloom. Nature as living wallpaper.
